name: Sander's Hot Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces NESTLES MILK CHOCOLATE (do not substitute with candy)
14 ounces Can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
Recipe #1 (preferred)
Method for either recipe:
Using either of the above ingredient combinations, place all ingredients in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir until smooth. Continue to cook for 30 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent scorching. Once cooked, process the hot sauce through a blender or beat at high speed with an electric mixer for a few minutes. Pour into refrigerator containers with lids and refrigerate the sauce between usages up to 2 weeks.
